prose: Pyridine frontier-orbital analysis via DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz (11 atoms), single-point calculation (not optimized). SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO−LUMO gap = 6.140 eV; HOMO = −7.253 eV, LUMO = −1.113 eV. Orbital descriptors (Koopmans-style): vertical IP = 7.253 eV, vertical EA = 1.113 eV, electronegativity = 4.183 eV, hardness = 3.070 eV, electrophilicity = 2.849 eV. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy. All checks pass. No warnings reported.
